transcript.text: Shorts don't make money. Brother, this is one video got 84 million views. As you can see, it took 24 days to get that. Also, I didn't even make this [music] video myself. This video took like probably 2 minutes for me to actually write this script for. Somebody else made the video entirely. The total revenue that I got from it was $5,000, bro. In fact, if I actually refresh this page because I had this up yesterday, when I refresh the page, let's see what we got now. So, literally made $500 in the last day. It's still getting views like 3 4 million views. So, shorts don't make money. Shorts don't make money.
